text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the spring Tenno Sho. We'll need
to best Special Week if we're to seize victory
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe has been racing well for a while,
but the more intense her emotions get, the
greater the stress her body has to endure. Her
passion is eating away at her like a poison.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Should I even be encouraging her to chase after
her friend? Bound by the contract we made, I can
only pray for her good health.
